heading: Tuesday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Scattered showers and thunderstorms north of Route 4, except likely near and north of Route 2, chance late in areas south of Route 4; severe storms possible. Lows from the mid 60s to lower 70s, some mid 70s far south. West winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Wednesday
text: Partly to mostly sunny south; variable clouds north. Chance of an early shower, then a slight chance of showers late in the north, with thunder possible. Highs in the low to mid 80s north, and mid 80s to around 90 in the south. West to northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Variable clouds. Chance of evening showers, mainly north. Lows in the low to mid 60s, with some upper 50s northeast and in the Adirondacks. West to northwest winds gusting to 25 mph early, then becoming west and decreasing to 5 to 10 mph.
